title: ESFA annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "This report sets out the activities of the Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA) over the period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.  It provides detailed information on:   our performance against our objectives how we used our resources   The accounts provide detailed accounting and expenditure information for the financial year 2024 to 2025.  "
